examples: When Idol hopefuls choose the "wrong" song, something just seems off. They're pitchy.
The cliffs and hills were so drawn together that hardly did the stars shine into its pitchy blackness.
When Idol hopefuls choose the "wrong" song, something just seems off. They're pitchy. Or too cabaret. Or just boring.
If this was "American Idol, " Randy Jackson would say Ms. Davis sang with passion but that she was a little pitchy.
But this promises interaction at scale, American Idol-level engagement for content just slightly more important than whether someone was pitchy or not.
